chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding Camels

text: 2485 - وَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «اِشْتَرُوا اَلسُّودَ اَلْقِبَاحَ فَإِنَّهَا أَطْوَلُ اَلْإِبِلِ أَعْمَاراً ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2485 - Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"Purchase black, unattractive camels, for they have the longest lifespans among camels."
